notes: Game runs fine. Partial controller support also works.
title: UNLOVED

notes: Game runs perfectly out of the box both windowed and in fullscreen with everything maxed 60fps+ at 1440p. But there is a stutter here and there, during what I presume is shader compilation (the game does appear to have a lot of shaders, the cache built up to ~10MB in just a few plays). The stutters occured less frequently with every play.
title: UNLOVED

notes: Game will boot to menu. Attempting to enter a character name will result in a crash. Attempting to bypass character creation by adding in a character file will allow you to to enter the main menu but loading up a level will instantly crash the game when you attempt to fire.
title: UNLOVED

notes: Playable(Kinda) There are slight micro stutters and freezes. This generally stops after a few minutes of gameplay. Fps was around 50-55 (never actually hitting 60) when playing with the 60FPS cap option. Disabling this option lead to me running at a solid 80-90 fps.
title: UNLOVED

notes: generally playable, had not tested online. performance is manageable, not that it was perfect on native.
